instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes. Ensure the response includes the phrase "hidden gems of Paris" and provides at least three specific examples of affordable attractions. Tailor the response for laypersons by simplifying any technical terms and providing clear explanations for public transportation options. The letter "P" must appear at least 15 times in the response. Structure the response in JSON format with the following keys: "Attractions", "Dining", "Transportation", and "BudgetTips". Each key must have a value that is an Array containing exactly 3 elements. The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words. The response must be written in Markdown format, including at least two level-2 headers.
response:
| Attractions | Dining | Transportation | BudgetTips |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| ["Montmartre offers peaceful views and artistic history for everyone.", "The Louvre Palace displays many famous paintings without cost.", "Seine River cruises provide cheap views of Parisian lights."] | ["Cheap cafés serve delicious sandwiches near popular shopping streets.", "Bakeries provide fresh pastries that are very affordable for people.", "Street food stalls offer tasty snacks at low prices daily."] | ["Metro trains connect all major points within the Parisian city.", "Bus routes run frequently and stop near many public buildings.", "Walking paths allow free movement between nearby popular places."] | ["Plan your trip carefully to save money on expensive hotel rooms.", "Book tickets online before you arrive to avoid high prices.", "Use student discounts whenever possible to pay less for entry fees."] |

## Discovering Hidden Gems of Paris
This trip highlights the hidden gems of Paris for every traveler. You will find many special places that are not very expensive.

## Planning Your Parisian Adventure
Paris offers many options for people who want to explore freely. The public transport system is simple and easy to understand quickly.
